case_title: LINDA OWYEUNG VS. WELLS FARGO BANK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,900.00 FILED BY OWYEUNG, LINDA G & O TAX SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-15-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE MITCHELL ON OCTOBER 03, 2016. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-18-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 IN ORDER FOR PLAINTIFF TO AMEND HER COMPLAINT TO ADD ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT(S). APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF LINDA OWYEUNG & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE ANA CARCAMO, OPERATIONAL RISK CONSULTANT FOR WELLS FARGO BANK. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,900.00 FILED BY OWYEUNG, LINDA G & O TAX SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANTS REQUEST - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED DEC-22-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-28-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HAS PRESETNED NO EVIDENCE TO SUPPROT HER CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT JASON TIONGSON. JASON TIONGSON IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF LINDA OWYEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ANA CARCAMO, OPERATIONAL RISK CONSULTANT. DEFENDANT JASON TIONGSON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWYEUNG, LINDA G & O TAX SERVICE
ORDER (SC-152 ) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-16-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-16-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF LINDA OWYEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY REPRESENTED BY ANA CARCAMO, OPERATIONAL RISK CONSULTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OWYEUNG, LINDA G & O TAX SERVICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK PLAINTIFF OPENED A BUSINESS ACCOUNT WITH DEFENDANT, RECEIVED BLANK CHECKS FOR THE ACCOUNT WHICH PLAINTIFF ACKNOWLEDGED HAD THE CORRECT NAME, ADDRESS AND ACCOUNT NUMBER. PLAINTIFF DEPOSITED MONEY INTO THE ACCOUNT WHICH WAS LEVIED BY THE FRANCHISE TAX BOARD. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT A CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
